sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتْ صِنَاعَةُ الْمُحْتَوَى الْيَوْمَ مِهْنَةً مُعْتَرَفًا بِهَا تَجْذِبُ الْمَلَايِينَ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ الطَّمُوحِينَ حَوْلَ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Kreiranje sadržaja danas je postalo priznata profesija koja privlači milione ambicioznih mladih ljudi širom svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: Content creation has become a recognized profession today, attracting millions of ambitious young people around the world.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَقْتَصِرُ الْأَمْرُ عَلَى الْتِقَاطِ الصُّوَرِ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ يَتَطَلَّبُ مَهَارَاتٍ تِقْنِيَّةً وَإِبْدَاعِيَّةً لِجَذْبِ الْجُمْهُورِ وَالتَّأْثِيرِ فِيهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Stvar se ne ograničava samo na fotografisanje, već zahtijeva tehničke i kreativne vještine kako bi se privukla publika i utjecalo na nju.
sentences.translationEn: It's not just about taking pictures; it requires technical and creative skills to attract and influence an audience.

sentences.arabic: يَبْذُلُ صُنَّاعُ الْمُحْتَوَى جُهْدًا كَبِيرًا فِي بَحْثِ الْمَوَاضِيعِ وَتَحْرِيرِ الْمَقَاطِعِ الْمَرْئِيَّةِ لِتَقْدِيمِ مَادَّةٍ ذَاتِ قِيمَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kreatori sadržaja ulažu veliki trud u istraživanje tema i montiranje video zapisa kako bi pružili vrijedan materijal.
sentences.translationEn: Content creators put a lot of effort into researching topics and editing videos to provide valuable material.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، يُوَاجِهُ هَؤُلَاءِ ضُغُوطًا هَائِلَةً لِلْبَقَاءِ فِي دَائِرَةِ الضَّوْءِ وَمُوَاكَبَةِ الْخَوَارِزْمِيَّاتِ الْمُتَغَيِّرَةِ بِاسْتِمْرَارٍ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, oni se suočavaju s ogromnim pritiscima da ostanu u centru pažnje i idu u korak s algoritmima koji se stalno mijenjaju.
sentences.translationEn: However, they face immense pressure to stay in the spotlight and keep up with constantly changing algorithms.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ النَّجَاحَ فِي هَذَا الْمَجَالِ يَعْتَمِدُ بِشَكْلٍ أَسَاسِيٍّ عَلَى الِاسْتِمْرَارِيَّةِ وَالْمِصْدَاقِيَّةِ مَعَ الْمُتَابِعِينَ.
sentences.translation: Uspjeh u ovoj oblasti prvenstveno zavisi od dosljednosti i vjerodostojnosti prema pratiocima.
sentences.translationEn: Success in this field primarily depends on consistency and credibility with followers.
